headline: Assessing MSCI (MSCI) Valuation As Recent Share Weakness Opens A Possible Discount Opportunity
summary: Why MSCI is on investors’ radar today MSCI (MSCI) continues to attract attention after recent share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month and past 3 months while still carrying a multi year total return track record. For context, MSCI last closed at US$545.69, with a market value of about US$40.4b. The company reports annual revenue of US$3,134.459m and net income of US$1,202.305m, supported by several distinct business segments. See our latest analysis for...
